summary: Tested Customers page UI improvements: 1) Saved filters displayed as horizontal tabs above the table - working correctly with 'Filtreler:' label and filter buttons with badge counts. 2) ProductsCell component for Ürünler column - popover opens on click, products can be selected from dropdown, new products can be typed and added, products can be deleted with X button. All features working correctly without page refresh issues.

issues: Console warning: Missing `Description` or `aria-describedby={undefined}` for {DialogContent} - accessibility improvement needed (minor)

passed_tests: ✅ TEST 1: Customers page loads correctly
✅ TEST 2: Saved filters section with 'Filtreler:' label visible above table
✅ TEST 3: Saved filter buttons displayed as horizontal tabs (İstanbul Müşterileri, Test)
✅ TEST 4: Filter tab buttons show badge with condition count
✅ TEST 5: Clicking filter tab loads filter and shows toast 'filtresi yüklendi'
✅ TEST 6: Active filter indicator 'Aktif:' visible with filter details and result count
✅ TEST 7: ProductsCell '+ Ekle' text visible for customers without products
✅ TEST 8: Clicking ProductsCell opens popover with 'Ürünler' label
✅ TEST 9: ProductsCell popover shows existing products as badges with X delete buttons
✅ TEST 10: ProductsCell has 'Listeden seç...' dropdown for selecting existing products
✅ TEST 11: Dropdown shows available product options
✅ TEST 12: Selecting product from dropdown adds it to customer
✅ TEST 13: Success toast 'Ürün eklendi' appears after adding product
✅ TEST 14: ProductsCell has 'Yeni ürün yaz...' input field
✅ TEST 15: Typing new product and clicking + button adds product
✅ TEST 16: New product is saved to options list (appears in dropdown for other customers)
✅ TEST 17: Clicking X button on product badge removes product
✅ TEST 18: Success toast 'Ürün kaldırıldı' appears after deleting product
✅ TEST 19: Page refresh works correctly - no auth loop
✅ TEST 20: 24 customer rows load after refresh
critical_code_review_comments: Minor: Add aria-describedby to DialogContent for accessibility compliance (same issue from iteration_10)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Customers page UI improvements fully functional: 1) Saved filters now displayed as horizontal tabs above the table with 'Filtreler:' label, each filter button shows badge with condition count. 2) ProductsCell component in Ürünler column allows: clicking to open popover, selecting products from dropdown, typing new products, deleting products with X button. Products added are saved to options list. No auth loop issues on page refresh.
